sEn: TRPO is a practical algorithm for optimizing policies with guaranteed monotonic improvement, effective for large nonlinear policies like neural networks.
sZh: TRPO是一种实用的策略优化算法，能保证单调改进，适用于神经网络等大型非线性策略。
absEn: We describe an iterative procedure for optimizing policies, with guaranteed monotonic improvement. By making several approximations to the theoretically-justified procedure, we develop a practical algorithm, called Trust Region Policy Optimization (TRPO). This algorithm is similar to natural policy gradient methods and is effective for optimizing large nonlinear policies such as neural networks. Our experiments demonstrate its robust performance on a wide variety of tasks: learning simulated robotic swimming, hopping, and walking gaits; and playing Atari games using images of the screen as input. Despite its approximations that deviate from the theory, TRPO tends to give monotonic improvement, with little tuning of hyperparameters.
absZh: 我们描述了一种迭代策略优化过程，具有保证的单调改进。通过对理论证明的过程进行若干近似，我们开发了一种实用的算法，称为信任区域策略优化（TRPO）。该算法类似于自然策略梯度方法，对于优化大型非线性策略（如神经网络）非常有效。我们的实验证明了它在各种任务上的稳健性能：学习模拟机器人游泳、跳跃和行走步态；以及使用屏幕图像作为输入玩Atari游戏。尽管其近似偏离了理论，TRPO往往在超参数调整很少的情况下实现单调改进。

contrib.en: Proves a monotonic improvement guarantee for policy optimization with KL divergence penalty.
contrib.zh: 证明了使用KL散度惩罚的策略优化具有单调改进保证。

contrib.en: Develops TRPO, a practical algorithm using a KL divergence constraint for robust updates.
contrib.zh: 开发了TRPO，一种使用KL散度约束进行稳健更新的实用算法。

contrib.zh: 展示了TRPO在模拟机器人运动和Atari游戏上的有效性。

contrib.en: Unifies policy gradient and policy iteration methods under a trust region framework.
contrib.zh: 在信任区域框架下统一了策略梯度和策略迭代方法。

contrib.en: Achieves state-of-the-art performance on high-dimensional control tasks with neural network policies.
contrib.zh: 在具有神经网络策略的高维控制任务上实现了最先进的性能。

limits.en: Assumes exact advantage evaluation, which is unrealistic in practice.
limits.zh: 假设优势函数精确评估，这在实践中不现实。

limits.en: Vine method requires state resets, limiting applicability to simulation.
limits.zh: Vine方法需要状态重置，限制了其在模拟环境中的应用。

limits.zh: 理论界限使用最大KL散度，但实际算法使用平均KL散度。

limits.en: Sample complexity may be high for real-world robotic tasks due to on-policy sampling.
limits.zh: 由于在策略采样，样本复杂度可能对真实机器人任务较高。

limits.zh: 在Atari游戏上的性能并不始终优于DQN等专门方法。

items.en: We describe an iterative procedure for optimizing policies, with guaranteed monotonic improvement. By making several approximations to the theoretically-justified procedure, we develop a practical algorithm, called Trust Region Policy Optimization (TRPO). This algorithm is similar to natural policy gradient methods and is effective for optimizing large nonlinear policies such as neural networks. Our experiments demonstrate its robust performance on a wide variety of tasks: learning simulated robotic swimming, hopping, and walking gaits; and playing Atari games using images of the screen as input. Despite its approximations that deviate from the theory, TRPO tends to give monotonic improvement, with little tuning of hyperparameters.
items.zh: 我们描述了一种用于优化策略的迭代过程，并保证单调改进。通过对理论证明的过程进行若干近似，我们开发了一种实用的算法，称为信任区域策略优化（TRPO）。该算法类似于自然策略梯度方法，并且对于优化大型非线性策略（如神经网络）非常有效。我们的实验证明了它在各种任务上的稳健性能：学习模拟机器人游泳、跳跃和行走步态；以及使用屏幕图像作为输入玩Atari游戏。尽管其近似偏离了理论，TRPO往往在超参数调整很少的情况下给出单调改进。

items.en: Most algorithms for policy optimization can be classified into three broad categories: (1) policy iteration methods, which alternate between estimating the value function under the current policy and improving the policy (Bertsekas, 2005); (2) policy gradient methods, which use an estimator of the gradient of the expected return (total reward) obtained from sample trajectories (Peters & Schaal, 2008a) (and which, as we later discuss, have a close connection to policy iteration); and (3) derivative-free optimization methods, such as the cross-entropy method (CEM) and covariance matrix adaptation (CMA), which treat the return as a black box function to be optimized in terms of the policy parameters (Szita & Lörincz, 2006).
items.zh: 大多数策略优化算法可分为三大类：（1）策略迭代方法，交替估计当前策略下的价值函数并改进策略（Bertsekas, 2005）；（2）策略梯度方法，利用从样本轨迹中获得的期望回报（总奖励）梯度的估计量（Peters & Schaal, 2008a），且如后文所述，与策略迭代有密切联系；（3）无导数优化方法，如交叉熵方法（CEM）和协方差矩阵自适应（CMA），将回报视为关于策略参数的黑箱函数进行优化（Szita & Lörincz, 2006）。

items.en: General derivative-free stochastic optimization methods such as CEM and CMA are preferred on many problems, because they achieve good results while being simple to understand and implement. For example, while Tetris is a classic benchmark problem for approximate dynamic programming (ADP) methods, stochastic optimization methods are difficult to beat on this task (Gabillon et al., 2013). For continuous control problems, methods like CMA have been successful at learning control policies for challenging tasks like locomotion when provided with hand-engineered policy classes with low-dimensional parameterizations (Wampler & Popović, 2009). The inability of ADP and gradient-based methods to consistently beat gradient-free random search is unsatisfying, since gradient-based optimization algorithms enjoy much better sample complexity guarantees than gradient-free methods (Nemirovski, 2005). Continuous gradient-based optimization has been very successful at learning function approximators for supervised learning tasks with huge numbers of parameters, and extending their success to reinforcement learning would allow for efficient training of complex and powerful policies.
items.zh: 诸如CEM和CMA等通用无导数随机优化方法在许多问题上备受青睐，因为它们易于理解和实现，同时能取得良好效果。例如，虽然俄罗斯方块是近似动态规划（ADP）方法的经典基准问题，但随机优化方法在此任务上难以被击败（Gabillon et al., 2013）。对于连续控制问题，当提供具有低维参数化的人工设计策略类时，CMA等方法已成功学习如运动等挑战性任务的控制策略（Wampler & Popović, 2009）。ADP和基于梯度的方法无法持续击败无梯度随机搜索，这令人不满，因为基于梯度的优化算法比无梯度方法享有更好的样本复杂度保证（Nemirovski, 2005）。连续基于梯度的优化在具有大量参数的监督学习任务中成功学习了函数逼近器，将其成功扩展到强化学习将有助于高效训练复杂且强大的策略。

items.en: In this article, we first prove that minimizing a certain surrogate objective function guarantees policy improvement with non-trivial step sizes. Then we make a series of approximations to the theoretically-justified algorithm, yielding a practical algorithm, which we call trust region policy optimization (TRPO). We describe two variants of this algorithm: first, the single-path method, which can be applied in the model-free setting; second, the vine method, which requires the system to be restored to particular states, which is typically only possible in simulation. These algorithms are scalable and can optimize nonlinear policies with tens of thousands of parameters, which have previously posed a major challenge for model-free policy search (Deisenroth et al., 2013). In our experiments, we show that the same TRPO methods can learn complex policies for swimming, hopping, and walking, as well as playing Atari games directly from raw images.
items.zh: 在本文中，我们首先证明最小化某个替代目标函数可以保证具有非平凡步长的策略改进。然后，我们对理论合理的算法进行一系列近似，得到一种实用算法，称为信任区域策略优化（TRPO）。我们描述了该算法的两种变体：第一种是单路径方法，可应用于无模型设置；第二种是藤蔓方法，需要系统恢复到特定状态，这通常仅在模拟中可行。这些算法具有可扩展性，可以优化具有数万个参数的非线性策略，而此前这对无模型策略搜索构成了重大挑战（Deisenroth et al., 2013）。在我们的实验中，我们展示了相同的TRPO方法可以学习游泳、跳跃和行走的复杂策略，以及直接从原始图像玩Atari游戏。

items.en: Thus, by maximizing Misubscript𝑀𝑖M_{i} at each iteration, we guarantee that the true objective η𝜂\eta is non-decreasing. This algorithm is a type of minorization-maximization (MM) algorithm (Hunter & Lange, 2004), which is a class of methods that also includes expectation maximization. In the terminology of MM algorithms, Misubscript𝑀𝑖M_{i} is the surrogate function that minorizes η𝜂\eta with equality at πisubscript𝜋𝑖\pi_{i}. This algorithm is also reminiscent of proximal gradient methods and mirror descent.
items.zh: 因此，通过在每次迭代中最大化 M_i，我们保证真实目标 η 是非递减的。该算法是一种 minorization-maximization (MM) 算法（Hunter & Lange, 2004），该类方法也包括期望最大化。在 MM 算法的术语中，M_i 是在 π_i 处 minorize η 且等式成立的代理函数。该算法也让人联想到近端梯度方法和镜像下降。

items.en: Trust region policy optimization, which we propose in the following section, is an approximation to Algorithm 1, which uses a constraint on the KL divergence rather than a penalty to robustly allow large updates.
items.zh: 我们在下一节中提出的信任区域策略优化是算法 1 的一种近似，它使用 KL 散度上的约束而不是惩罚项来稳健地允许大更新。

items.en: In the previous section, we considered the policy optimization problem independently of the parameterization of π𝜋\pi and under the assumption that the policy can be evaluated at all states. We now describe how to derive a practical algorithm from these theoretical foundations, under finite sample counts and arbitrary parameterizations.
items.zh: 在上一节中，我们考虑了策略优化问题，独立于π的参数化，并假设可以在所有状态下评估策略。现在我们描述如何从这些理论基础出发，在有限样本数量和任意参数化下推导出实用算法。

items.en: Since we consider parameterized policies πθ​(a|s)subscript𝜋𝜃conditional𝑎𝑠\pi_{\theta}(a|s) with parameter vector θ𝜃\theta, we will overload our previous notation to use functions of θ𝜃\theta rather than π𝜋\pi, e.g. η​(θ):=η​(πθ)assign𝜂𝜃𝜂subscript𝜋𝜃\eta(\theta)\vcentcolon=\eta(\pi_{\theta}), Lθ​(θ~):=Lπθ​(πθ~)assignsubscript𝐿𝜃~𝜃subscript𝐿subscript𝜋𝜃subscript𝜋~𝜃L_{\theta}(\tilde{\theta})\vcentcolon=L_{\pi_{\theta}}(\pi_{\tilde{\theta}}), and DKL​(θ∥θ~):=DKL​(πθ∥πθ~)assignsubscript𝐷KLconditional𝜃~𝜃subscript𝐷KLconditionalsubscript𝜋𝜃subscript𝜋~𝜃D_{\rm KL}(\theta\ \|\ \tilde{\theta})\vcentcolon=D_{\rm KL}(\pi_{\theta}\ \|\ \pi_{\tilde{\theta}}). We will use θoldsubscript𝜃old\theta_{\mathrm{old}} to denote the previous policy parameters that we want to improve upon.
items.zh: 由于我们考虑参数化策略πθ(a|s)，其参数向量为θ，我们将重载之前的符号，使用θ的函数而非π的函数，例如η(θ):=η(πθ)，Lθ(θ~):=Lπθ(πθ~)，以及DKL(θ∥θ~):=DKL(πθ∥πθ~)。我们将使用θold表示我们希望改进的先前策略参数。

Thus, by performing the following maximization, we are guaranteed to improve the true objective η𝜂\eta:
items.zh: 上一节表明η(θ) ≥ Lθold(θ) - C DKLmax(θold, θ)，在θ=θold时取等号。因此，通过执行以下最大化，我们保证能改进真实目标η：

items.en: In practice, if we used the penalty coefficient C𝐶C recommended by the theory above, the step sizes would be very small. One way to take larger steps in a robust way is to use a constraint on the KL divergence between the new policy and the old policy, i.e., a trust region constraint:
items.zh: 在实践中，如果使用上述理论推荐的惩罚系数C，步长会非常小。一种稳健地采取更大步长的方法是使用新策略与旧策略之间KL散度的约束，即信任区域约束：

items.en: This problem imposes a constraint that the KL divergence is bounded at every point in the state space. While it is motivated by the theory, this problem is impractical to solve due to the large number of constraints. Instead, we can use a heuristic approximation which considers the average KL divergence:
items.zh: 该问题施加了一个约束，要求KL散度在状态空间的每个点都有界。虽然这由理论驱动，但由于约束数量庞大，该问题难以求解。相反，我们可以使用一种启发式近似，考虑平均KL散度：

items.en: We therefore propose solving the following optimization problem to generate a policy update:
items.zh: 因此，我们建议求解以下优化问题以生成策略更新：

items.en: Similar policy updates have been proposed in prior work (Bagnell & Schneider, 2003; Peters & Schaal, 2008b; Peters et al., 2010), and we compare our approach to prior methods in Section 7 and in the experiments in Section 8. Our experiments also show that this type of constrained update has similar empirical performance to the maximum KL divergence constraint in Equation (11).
items.zh: 类似策略更新已在先前工作中提出（Bagnell & Schneider, 2003; Peters & Schaal, 2008b; Peters et al., 2010），我们在第7节和实验第8节中将我们的方法与先前方法进行比较。我们的实验还表明，这种类型的约束更新在经验性能上与方程(11)中的最大KL散度约束相当。

full.sec: 5 Sample-Based Estimation of the Objective and Constraint
full.secZh: 5 目标和约束的基于样本的估计

items.en: The previous section proposed a constrained optimization problem on the policy parameters (Equation (12)), which optimizes an estimate of the expected total reward η𝜂\eta subject to a constraint on the change in the policy at each update. This section describes how the objective and constraint functions can be approximated using Monte Carlo simulation.
items.zh: 上一节提出了一个关于策略参数的约束优化问题（方程 (12)），该问题在每次更新时对策略变化的约束下优化预期总奖励 η 的估计。本节描述如何通过蒙特卡洛模拟来近似目标和约束函数。

items.zh: 方程 13 中的优化问题完全等价于以下用期望形式表示的问题：

items.en: All that remains is to replace the expectations by sample averages and replace the Q𝑄Q value by an empirical estimate. The following sections describe two different schemes for performing this estimation.
items.zh: 剩下的工作是将期望替换为样本平均值，并将 Q 值替换为经验估计。以下两节描述了执行此估计的两种不同方案。

items.en: The first sampling scheme, which we call single path, is the one that is typically used for policy gradient estimation (Bartlett & Baxter, 2011), and is based on sampling individual trajectories. The second scheme, which we call vine, involves constructing a rollout set and then performing multiple actions from each state in the rollout set. This method has mostly been explored in the context of policy iteration methods (Lagoudakis & Parr, 2003; Gabillon et al., 2013).
items.zh: 第一种采样方案，我们称之为单路径，是策略梯度估计中通常使用的方案（Bartlett & Baxter, 2011），基于对单个轨迹进行采样。第二种方案，我们称之为藤，涉及构建一个 rollout 集，然后从 rollout 集中的每个状态执行多个动作。这种方法主要在策略迭代方法的背景下被探索（Lagoudakis & Parr, 2003; Gabillon et al., 2013）。

items.en: In this estimation procedure, we collect a sequence of states by sampling s0∼ρ0similar-tosubscript𝑠0subscript𝜌0s_{0}\sim\rho_{0} and then simulating the policy πθoldsubscript𝜋subscript𝜃old\pi_{\theta_{\mathrm{old}}} for some number of timesteps to generate a trajectory s0,a0,s1,a1,…,sT−1,aT−1,sTsubscript𝑠0subscript𝑎0subscript𝑠1subscript𝑎1…subscript𝑠𝑇1subscript𝑎𝑇1subscript𝑠𝑇s_{0},a_{0},s_{1},a_{1},\dots,s_{T-1},a_{T-1},s_{T}. Hence, q​(a|s)=πθold​(a|s)𝑞conditional𝑎𝑠subscript𝜋subscript𝜃oldconditional𝑎𝑠q(a|s)=\pi_{\theta_{\mathrm{old}}}(a|s). Qθold​(s,a)subscript𝑄subscript𝜃old𝑠𝑎Q_{\theta_{\mathrm{old}}}(s,a) is computed at each state-action pair (st,at)subscript𝑠𝑡subscript𝑎𝑡(s_{t},a_{t}) by taking the discounted sum of future rewards along the trajectory.
items.zh: 在此估计过程中，我们通过采样 s0∼ρ0 并模拟策略 πθold 若干时间步来生成轨迹 s0,a0,s1,a1,…,sT−1,aT−1,sT，从而收集状态序列。因此，q(a|s)=πθold(a|s)。在每个状态-动作对 (st,at) 处，通过沿轨迹计算未来奖励的折扣和来得到 Qθold(s,a)。

items.capEn: Figure 1: Left: illustration of single path procedure. Here, we generate a set of trajectories via simulation of the policy and incorporate all state-action pairs (sn,ansubscript𝑠𝑛subscript𝑎𝑛s_{n},a_{n}) into the objective. Right: illustration of vine procedure. We generate a set of “trunk” trajectories, and then generate “branch” rollouts from a subset of the reached states. For each of these states snsubscript𝑠𝑛s_{n}, we perform multiple actions (a1subscript𝑎1a_{1} and a2subscript𝑎2a_{2} here) and perform a rollout after each action, using common random numbers (CRN) to reduce the variance.
items.capZh: 图1：左图：单路径过程的示意图。这里，我们通过策略模拟生成一组轨迹，并将所有状态-动作对 (sn,an) 纳入目标函数。右图：藤蔓过程的示意图。我们生成一组“主干”轨迹，然后从到达状态的一个子集中生成“分支” rollout。对于每个这样的状态 sn，我们执行多个动作（此处为 a1 和 a2），并在每个动作后执行 rollout，使用公共随机数（CRN）来降低方差。

items.en: In this estimation procedure, we first sample s0∼ρ0similar-tosubscript𝑠0subscript𝜌0s_{0}\sim\rho_{0} and simulate the policy πθisubscript𝜋subscript𝜃𝑖\pi_{\theta_{i}} to generate a number of trajectories. We then choose a subset of N𝑁N states along these trajectories, denoted s1,s2,…,sNsubscript𝑠1subscript𝑠2…subscript𝑠𝑁s_{1},s_{2},\dots,s_{N}, which we call the “rollout set”. For each state snsubscript𝑠𝑛s_{n} in the rollout set, we sample K𝐾K actions according to an,k∼q(⋅|sn)a_{n,k}\sim q(\cdot|s_{n}). Any choice of q(⋅|sn)q(\cdot|s_{n}) with a support that includes the support of πθi(⋅|sn)\pi_{\theta_{i}}(\cdot|s_{n}) will produce a consistent estimator. In practice, we found that q(⋅|sn)=πθi(⋅|sn)q(\cdot|s_{n})=\pi_{\theta_{i}}(\cdot|s_{n}) works well on continuous problems, such as robotic locomotion, while the uniform distribution works well on discrete tasks, such as the Atari games, where it can sometimes achieve better exploration.
items.zh: 在此估计过程中，我们首先采样 s0∼ρ0 并模拟策略 πθi 以生成若干轨迹。然后，我们沿这些轨迹选择 N 个状态的子集，记为 s1,s2,…,sN，称为“rollout 集”。对于 rollout 集中的每个状态 sn，我们根据 an,k∼q(⋅|sn) 采样 K 个动作。任何支撑集包含 πθi(⋅|sn) 支撑集的 q(⋅|sn) 选择都能产生一致的估计量。实践中，我们发现对于连续问题（如机器人运动），q(⋅|sn)=πθi(⋅|sn) 效果良好；而对于离散任务（如 Atari 游戏），均匀分布效果良好，有时能实现更好的探索。

items.en: For each action an,ksubscript𝑎𝑛𝑘a_{n,k} sampled at each state snsubscript𝑠𝑛s_{n}, we estimate Q^θi​(sn,an,k)subscript^𝑄subscript𝜃𝑖subscript𝑠𝑛subscript𝑎𝑛𝑘\hat{Q}_{\theta_{i}}(s_{n},a_{n,k}) by performing a rollout (i.e., a short trajectory) starting with state snsubscript𝑠𝑛s_{n} and action an,ksubscript𝑎𝑛𝑘a_{n,k}. We can greatly reduce the variance of the Q𝑄Q-value differences between rollouts by using the same random number sequence for the noise in each of the K𝐾K rollouts, i.e., common random numbers. See (Bertsekas, 2005) for additional discussion on Monte Carlo estimation of Q𝑄Q-values and (Ng & Jordan, 2000) for a discussion of common random numbers in reinforcement learning.
items.zh: 对于在每个状态 sn 采样的每个动作 an,k，我们通过从状态 sn 和动作 an,k 开始执行 rollout（即短轨迹）来估计 Q^θi(sn,an,k)。通过在 K 个 rollout 中使用相同的随机数序列作为噪声（即公共随机数），可以大大降低 Q 值差异的方差。关于 Q 值的蒙特卡洛估计的更多讨论见 (Bertsekas, 2005)，关于强化学习中公共随机数的讨论见 (Ng & Jordan, 2000)。

items.en: In small, finite action spaces, we can generate a rollout for every possible action from a given state. The contribution to Lθoldsubscript𝐿subscript𝜃oldL_{\theta_{\mathrm{old}}} from a single state snsubscript𝑠𝑛s_{n} is as follows:

In large or continuous state spaces, we can construct an estimator of the surrogate objective using importance sampling. The self-normalized estimator (Owen (2013), Chapter 9) of Lθoldsubscript𝐿subscript𝜃oldL_{\theta_{\mathrm{old}}} obtained at a single state snsubscript𝑠𝑛s_{n} is

items.en: assuming that we performed K𝐾K actions an,1,an,2,…,an,Ksubscript𝑎𝑛1subscript𝑎𝑛2…subscript𝑎𝑛𝐾a_{n,1},a_{n,2},\dots,a_{n,K} from state snsubscript𝑠𝑛s_{n}. This self-normalized estimator removes the need to use a baseline for the Q𝑄Q-values (note that the gradient is unchanged by adding a constant to the Q𝑄Q-values). Averaging over sn∼ρ​(π)similar-tosubscript𝑠𝑛𝜌𝜋s_{n}\sim\rho(\pi), we obtain an estimator for Lθoldsubscript𝐿subscript𝜃oldL_{\theta_{\mathrm{old}}}, as well as its gradient.
items.zh: 假设我们从状态 sn 执行了 K 个动作 an,1,an,2,…,an,K。此自归一化估计量消除了对 Q 值使用基线的需要（注意，向 Q 值添加常数不会改变梯度）。对 sn∼ρ(π) 求平均，我们得到 Lθold 及其梯度的估计量。

items.en: The vine and single path methods are illustrated in Figure 1. We use the term vine, since the trajectories used for sampling can be likened to the stems of vines, which branch at various points (the rollout set) into several short offshoots (the rollout trajectories).
items.zh: Vine 方法和单路径方法如图 1 所示。我们使用术语 vine，因为用于采样的轨迹可以类比为藤蔓的茎，它们在各个点（rollout 集）分支成若干短分支（rollout 轨迹）。

items.en: The benefit of the vine method over the single path method that is our local estimate of the objective has much lower variance given the same number of Q𝑄Q-value samples in the surrogate objective. That is, the vine method gives much better estimates of the advantage values. The downside of the vine method is that we must perform far more calls to the simulator for each of these advantage estimates. Furthermore, the vine method requires us to generate multiple trajectories from each state in the rollout set, which limits this algorithm to settings where the system can be reset to an arbitrary state. In contrast, the single path algorithm requires no state resets and can be directly implemented on a physical system (Peters & Schaal, 2008b).
items.zh: 与单路径方法相比，Vine 方法的优势在于，在替代目标中使用相同数量的 Q 值样本时，我们对目标的局部估计具有更低的方差。也就是说，Vine 方法能给出更好的优势值估计。Vine 方法的缺点是我们必须为每个优势估计执行更多的模拟器调用。此外，Vine 方法要求我们从 rollout 集中的每个状态生成多条轨迹，这限制了该方法适用于系统可以重置到任意状态的场景。相比之下，单路径算法不需要状态重置，可以直接在物理系统上实现 (Peters & Schaal, 2008b)。

items.en: Here we present two practical policy optimization algorithm based on the ideas above, which use either the single path or vine sampling scheme from the preceding section. The algorithms repeatedly perform the following steps:
items.zh: 这里我们提出两种基于上述思想的实用策略优化算法，它们分别使用前一节中的单路径或藤蔓采样方案。这些算法重复执行以下步骤：

items.en: Use the single path or vine procedures to collect a set of state-action pairs along with Monte Carlo estimates of their Q𝑄Q-values.
items.zh: 使用单路径或藤蔓程序收集一组状态-动作对，以及它们 Q 值的蒙特卡洛估计。

items.en: By averaging over samples, construct the estimated objective and constraint in Equation 14.
items.zh: 通过对样本进行平均，构建公式 14 中的估计目标和约束。

items.en: Approximately solve this constrained optimization problem to update the policy’s parameter vector θ𝜃\theta. We use the conjugate gradient algorithm followed by a line search, which is altogether only slightly more expensive than computing the gradient itself. See Appendix C for details.
items.zh: 近似求解这个约束优化问题以更新策略的参数向量 θ。我们使用共轭梯度算法后跟线搜索，这总共只比计算梯度本身稍微昂贵一点。详见附录 C。

items.en: With regard to (3), we construct the Fisher information matrix (FIM) by analytically computing the Hessian of the KL divergence, rather than using the covariance matrix of the gradients. That is, we estimate Ai​jsubscript𝐴𝑖𝑗A_{ij} as 1N∑n=1N∂2∂θi​∂θjDKL(πθold(⋅|sn)∥πθ(⋅|sn))\frac{1}{N}\sum_{n=1}^{N}\frac{\partial^{2}}{\partial\theta_{i}\partial\theta_{j}}D_{\rm KL}(\pi_{\theta_{\mathrm{old}}}(\cdot|s_{n})\ \|\ \pi_{\theta}(\cdot|s_{n})), rather than 1N​∑n=1N∂∂θi​log⁡πθ​(an|sn)​∂∂θj​log⁡πθ​(an|sn)1𝑁superscriptsubscript𝑛1𝑁subscript𝜃𝑖subscript𝜋𝜃conditionalsubscript𝑎𝑛subscript𝑠𝑛subscript𝜃𝑗subscript𝜋𝜃conditionalsubscript𝑎𝑛subscript𝑠𝑛\frac{1}{N}\sum_{n=1}^{N}\frac{\partial}{\partial\theta_{i}}\log\pi_{\theta}(a_{n}|s_{n})\frac{\partial}{\partial\theta_{j}}\log\pi_{\theta}(a_{n}|s_{n}). The analytic estimator integrates over the action at each state snsubscript𝑠𝑛s_{n}, and does not depend on the action ansubscript𝑎𝑛a_{n} that was sampled. As described in Appendix C, this analytic estimator has computational benefits in the large-scale setting, since it removes the need to store a dense Hessian or all policy gradients from a batch of trajectories. The rate of improvement in the policy is similar to the empirical FIM, as shown in the experiments.
items.zh: 关于 (3)，我们通过解析计算 KL 散度的 Hessian 矩阵来构建 Fisher 信息矩阵 (FIM)，而不是使用梯度的协方差矩阵。也就是说，我们将 A_ij 估计为 1/N ∑_{n=1}^N ∂^2/(∂θ_i ∂θ_j) D_KL(π_{θ_old}(·|s_n) ‖ π_θ(·|s_n))，而不是 1/N ∑_{n=1}^N ∂/(∂θ_i) log π_θ(a_n|s_n) ∂/(∂θ_j) log π_θ(a_n|s_n)。解析估计器在每个状态 s_n 上对动作进行积分，并且不依赖于采样的动作 a_n。如附录 C 所述，这种解析估计器在大规模设置中具有计算优势，因为它消除了存储密集 Hessian 矩阵或一批轨迹的所有策略梯度的需要。策略的改进速率与经验 FIM 相似，如实验所示。

items.en: Let us briefly summarize the relationship between the theory from Section 3 and the practical algorithm we have described:
items.zh: 让我们简要总结第 3 节的理论与我们描述的实际算法之间的关系：

items.en: The theory justifies optimizing a surrogate objective with a penalty on KL divergence. However, the large penalty coefficient C𝐶C leads to prohibitively small steps, so we would like to decrease this coefficient. Empirically, it is hard to robustly choose the penalty coefficient, so we use a hard constraint instead of a penalty, with parameter δ𝛿\delta (the bound on KL divergence).
items.zh: 理论证明了优化带有 KL 散度惩罚的替代目标函数的合理性。然而，大的惩罚系数 C 会导致步长过小，因此我们希望减小这个系数。经验上，很难稳健地选择惩罚系数，因此我们使用硬约束而不是惩罚，参数为 δ（KL 散度的界限）。

items.en: The constraint on DKLmax​(θold,θ)subscriptsuperscript𝐷maxKLsubscript𝜃old𝜃{D^{\rm max}_{\rm KL}}(\theta_{\mathrm{old}},\theta) is hard for numerical optimization and estimation, so instead we constrain D¯KL​(θold,θ)subscript¯𝐷KLsubscript𝜃old𝜃{\overline{D}_{\rm KL}}(\theta_{\mathrm{old}},\theta).
items.zh: 对 D^{max}_{KL}(θ_old, θ) 的约束对于数值优化和估计来说很困难，因此我们约束 D̄_{KL}(θ_old, θ)。

items.en: Our theory ignores estimation error for the advantage function. Kakade & Langford (2002) consider this error in their derivation, and the same arguments would hold in the setting of this paper, but we omit them for simplicity.
items.zh: 我们的理论忽略了优势函数的估计误差。Kakade & Langford (2002) 在他们的推导中考虑了这种误差，同样的论点也适用于本文的设置，但为了简单起见我们省略了它们。

items.en: As mentioned in Section 4, our derivation results in a policy update that is related to several prior methods, providing a unifying perspective on a number of policy update schemes. The natural policy gradient (Kakade, 2002) can be obtained as a special case of the update in Equation (12) by using a linear approximation to L𝐿L and a quadratic approximation to the D¯KLsubscript¯𝐷KL{\overline{D}_{\rm KL}} constraint, resulting in the following problem:
items.zh: 如第4节所述，我们的推导得到的策略更新与若干先前方法相关，为多种策略更新方案提供了统一的视角。自然策略梯度（Kakade, 2002）可以作为方程(12)中更新的特例，通过对L𝐿L使用线性近似和对D¯KLsubscript¯𝐷KL{\overline{D}_{\rm KL}}约束使用二次近似得到，从而产生以下问题：

items.en: The update is θnew=θold+1λA(θold)−1∇θL(θ)|θ=θold\theta_{\mathrm{new}}=\theta_{\mathrm{old}}+\frac{1}{\lambda}A(\theta_{\mathrm{old}})^{-1}\nabla_{\theta}L(\theta)\big{\rvert}_{\theta=\theta_{\mathrm{old}}}, where the stepsize 1λ1𝜆\frac{1}{\lambda} is typically treated as an algorithm parameter. This differs from our approach, which enforces the constraint at each update. Though this difference might seem subtle, our experiments demonstrate that it significantly improves the algorithm’s performance on larger problems.
items.zh: 更新为θnew=θold+1λA(θold)−1∇θL(θ)|θ=θold\theta_{\mathrm{new}}=\theta_{\mathrm{old}}+\frac{1}{\lambda}A(\theta_{\mathrm{old}})^{-1}\nabla_{\theta}L(\theta)\big{\rvert}_{\theta=\theta_{\mathrm{old}}}，其中步长1λ1𝜆\frac{1}{\lambda}通常被视为算法参数。这与我们的方法不同，我们的方法在每次更新时强制执行约束。尽管这种差异看似细微，但我们的实验表明，它在较大问题上显著提高了算法的性能。

items.en: We can also obtain the standard policy gradient update by using an ℓ2subscriptℓ2\ell_{2} constraint or penalty:
items.zh: 我们也可以通过使用ℓ2subscriptℓ2\ell_{2}约束或惩罚项来得到标准策略梯度更新：

items.en: The policy iteration update can also be obtained by solving the unconstrained problem maximizeπLπold​(π)subscriptmaximize𝜋subscript𝐿subscript𝜋old𝜋\operatorname*{maximize}_{\pi}L_{\pi_{\mathrm{old}}}(\pi), using L𝐿L as defined in Equation 3.
items.zh: 策略迭代更新也可以通过求解无约束问题maximizeπLπold​(π)\operatorname*{maximize}_{\pi}L_{\pi_{\mathrm{old}}}(\pi)得到，其中L𝐿L如方程3所定义。

items.en: Several other methods employ an update similar to Equation (12). Relative entropy policy search (REPS) (Peters et al., 2010) constrains the state-action marginals p​(s,a)𝑝𝑠𝑎p(s,a), while TRPO constrains the conditionals p​(a|s)𝑝conditional𝑎𝑠p(a|s). Unlike REPS, our approach does not require a costly nonlinear optimization in the inner loop. Levine and Abbeel (2014) also use a KL divergence constraint, but its purpose is to encourage the policy not to stray from regions where the estimated dynamics model is valid, while we do not attempt to estimate the system dynamics explicitly. Pirotta et al. (2013) also build on and generalize Kakade and Langford’s results, and they derive different algorithms from the ones here.
items.zh: 其他几种方法也采用了类似于方程(12)的更新。相对熵策略搜索（REPS）（Peters et al., 2010）约束状态-动作边缘分布p​(s,a)p(s,a)，而TRPO约束条件分布p​(a|s)p(a|s)。与REPS不同，我们的方法不需要在内部循环中进行昂贵的非线性优化。Levine和Abbeel（2014）也使用了KL散度约束，但其目的是鼓励策略不偏离估计动力学模型有效的区域，而我们并不试图显式估计系统动力学。Pirotta等人（2013）也基于并推广了Kakade和Langford的结果，但他们推导出的算法与本文不同。

items.en: We designed our experiments to investigate the following questions:
items.zh: 我们设计实验以探究以下问题：

items.en: What are the performance characteristics of the single path and vine sampling procedures?
items.zh: 单路径和藤蔓采样过程的性能特征是什么？

items.en: TRPO is related to prior methods (e.g. natural policy gradient) but makes several changes, most notably by using a fixed KL divergence rather than a fixed penalty coefficient. How does this affect the performance of the algorithm?
items.zh: TRPO 与先前方法（如自然策略梯度）相关，但做出了一些改变，最显著的是使用固定的 KL 散度而非固定的惩罚系数。这对算法的性能有何影响？

items.en: Can TRPO be used to solve challenging large-scale problems? How does TRPO compare with other methods when applied to large-scale problems, with regard to final performance, computation time, and sample complexity?
items.zh: TRPO 能否用于解决具有挑战性的大规模问题？在大规模问题上，TRPO 与其他方法在最终性能、计算时间和样本复杂度方面相比如何？

items.en: To answer (1) and (2), we compare the performance of the single path and vine variants of TRPO, several ablated variants, and a number of prior policy optimization algorithms. With regard to (3), we show that both the single path and vine algorithm can obtain high-quality locomotion controllers from scratch, which is considered to be a hard problem. We also show that these algorithms produce competitive results when learning policies for playing Atari games from images using convolutional neural networks with tens of thousands of parameters.
items.zh: 为回答 (1) 和 (2)，我们比较了 TRPO 的单路径和藤蔓变体、几种消融变体以及许多先前的策略优化算法的性能。关于 (3)，我们展示了单路径和藤蔓算法都能从零开始获得高质量的 locomotion 控制器，这被认为是一个难题。我们还展示了这些算法在使用具有数万个参数的卷积神经网络从图像学习玩 Atari 游戏的策略时，能产生有竞争力的结果。

items.capEn: Figure 2: 2D robot models used for locomotion experiments. From left to right: swimmer, hopper, walker. The hopper and walker present a particular challenge, due to underactuation and contact discontinuities.
items.capZh: 图2：用于运动实验的二维机器人模型。从左到右：游泳者、跳跃者、步行者。跳跃者和步行者由于欠驱动和接触不连续性而面临特殊挑战。

items.capEn: Figure 3: Neural networks used for the locomotion task (top) and for playing Atari games (bottom).
items.capZh: 图3：用于运动任务（顶部）和玩 Atari 游戏（底部）的神经网络。

items.en: We conducted the robotic locomotion experiments using the MuJoCo simulator (Todorov et al., 2012). The three simulated robots are shown in Figure 2. The states of the robots are their generalized positions and velocities, and the controls are joint torques. Underactuation, high dimensionality, and non-smooth dynamics due to contacts make these tasks very challenging. The following models are included in our evaluation:
items.zh: 我们使用 MuJoCo 模拟器（Todorov 等人，2012）进行了机器人运动实验。三个模拟机器人如图 2 所示。机器人的状态是其广义位置和速度，控制量为关节力矩。欠驱动、高维度和接触导致的非光滑动力学使得这些任务极具挑战性。我们的评估包括以下模型：

items.en: Swimmer. 101010-dimensional state space, linear reward for forward progress and a quadratic penalty on joint effort to produce the reward r​(x,u)=vx−10−5​‖u‖2𝑟𝑥𝑢subscript𝑣𝑥superscript105superscriptnorm𝑢2r(x,u)=v_{x}-10^{-5}\|u\|^{2}. The swimmer can propel itself forward by making an undulating motion.
items.zh: Swimmer。状态空间为 10 维，前进速度的线性奖励和关节力矩的二次惩罚构成奖励 r(x,u)=vx−10⁻⁵‖u‖²。游泳者通过波动运动推动自身前进。

items.en: Hopper. 121212-dimensional state space, same reward as the swimmer, with a bonus of +11+1 for being in a non-terminal state. We ended the episodes when the hopper fell over, which was defined by thresholds on the torso height and angle.
items.zh: Hopper。状态空间为 12 维，奖励与游泳者相同，并在非终止状态下给予 +1 的奖励。当 hopper 跌倒时（由躯干高度和角度的阈值定义），我们终止回合。

items.en: Walker. 181818-dimensional state space. For the walker, we added a penalty for strong impacts of the feet against the ground to encourage a smooth walk rather than a hopping gait.
items.zh: Walker。状态空间为 18 维。对于 walker，我们增加了对脚部强烈撞击地面的惩罚，以鼓励平滑行走而非跳跃步态。

items.en: We used δ=0.01𝛿0.01\delta=0.01 for all experiments. See Table 2 in the Appendix for more details on the experimental setup and parameters used. We used neural networks to represent the policy, with the architecture shown in Figure 3, and further details provided in Appendix D. To establish a standard baseline, we also included the classic cart-pole balancing problem, based on the formulation from Barto et al. (1983), using a linear policy with six parameters that is easy to optimize with derivative-free black-box optimization methods.
items.zh: 所有实验均使用 δ=0.01。实验设置和参数的更多细节见附录表 2。我们使用神经网络表示策略，其架构如图 3 所示，更多细节见附录 D。为了建立标准基线，我们还包含了经典的 cart-pole 平衡问题，基于 Barto 等人（1983）的公式，使用具有六个参数的线性策略，易于通过无导数黑盒优化方法优化。

items.en: The following algorithms were considered in the comparison: single path TRPO; vine TRPO; cross-entropy method (CEM), a gradient-free method (Szita & Lörincz, 2006); covariance matrix adaption (CMA), another gradient-free method (Hansen & Ostermeier, 1996); natural gradient, the classic natural policy gradient algorithm (Kakade, 2002), which differs from single path by the use of a fixed penalty coefficient (Lagrange multiplier) instead of the KL divergence constraint; empirical FIM, identical to single path, except that the FIM is estimated using the covariance matrix of the gradients rather than the analytic estimate; max KL, which was only tractable on the cart-pole problem, and uses the maximum KL divergence in Equation (11), rather than the average divergence, allowing us to evaluate the quality of this approximation. The parameters used in the experiments are provided in Appendix E. For the natural gradient method, we swept through the possible values of the stepsize in factors of three, and took the best value according to the final performance.
items.zh: 比较中考虑了以下算法：单路径 TRPO；vine TRPO；交叉熵方法（CEM），一种无梯度方法（Szita & Lörincz, 2006）；协方差矩阵适应（CMA），另一种无梯度方法（Hansen & Ostermeier, 1996）；自然梯度，经典的自然策略梯度算法（Kakade, 2002），与单路径的区别在于使用固定的惩罚系数（拉格朗日乘子）而非 KL 散度约束；经验 FIM，与单路径相同，但 FIM 使用梯度的协方差矩阵估计而非解析估计；最大 KL，仅在 cart-pole 问题上可行，使用方程（11）中的最大 KL 散度而非平均散度，使我们能够评估该近似的质量。实验中使用的参数见附录 E。对于自然梯度方法，我们以三倍步长扫描可能的步长值，并根据最终性能取最佳值。

items.capEn: Figure 4: Learning curves for locomotion tasks, averaged across five runs of each algorithm with random initializations. Note that for the hopper and walker, a score of −11-1 is achievable without any forward velocity, indicating a policy that simply learned balanced standing, but not walking.
items.capZh: 图4：运动任务的学习曲线，每个算法随机初始化运行五次取平均。注意，对于跳跃者和步行者，在没有前向速度的情况下可以达到 -1 的分数，这表明策略仅学会了平衡站立，而非行走。

items.en: Learning curves showing the total reward averaged across five runs of each algorithm are shown in Figure 4. Single path and vine TRPO solved all of the problems, yielding the best solutions. Natural gradient performed well on the two easier problems, but was unable to generate hopping and walking gaits that made forward progress. These results provide empirical evidence that constraining the KL divergence is a more robust way to choose step sizes and make fast, consistent progress, compared to using a fixed penalty. CEM and CMA are derivative-free algorithms, hence their sample complexity scales unfavorably with the number of parameters, and they performed poorly on the larger problems. The max KL method learned somewhat more slowly than our final method, due to the more restrictive form of the constraint, but overall the result suggests that the average KL divergence constraint has a similar effect as the theorecally justified maximum KL divergence. Videos of the policies learned by TRPO may be viewed on the project website: http://sites.google.com/site/trpopaper/.
items.zh: 学习曲线显示每种算法五次运行的总奖励平均值，如图 4 所示。单路径和 vine TRPO 解决了所有问题，得到了最佳解。自然梯度在两个较简单的问题上表现良好，但无法产生前进的跳跃和行走步态。这些结果提供了经验证据，表明与使用固定惩罚相比，约束 KL 散度是选择步长并实现快速、一致进步的更稳健方法。CEM 和 CMA 是无导数算法，因此它们的样本复杂度随参数数量增加而不利地缩放，在较大问题上表现不佳。最大 KL 方法的学习速度比我们的最终方法稍慢，因为约束形式更严格，但总体结果表明，平均 KL 散度约束与理论上合理的最大 KL 散度具有类似效果。TRPO 学习到的策略视频可在项目网站查看：http://sites.google.com/site/trpopaper/。

items.en: Note that TRPO learned all of the gaits with general-purpose policies and simple reward functions, using minimal prior knowledge. This is in contrast with most prior methods for learning locomotion, which typically rely on hand-architected policy classes that explicitly encode notions of balance and stepping (Tedrake et al., 2004; Geng et al., 2006; Wampler & Popović, 2009).
items.zh: 注意，TRPO 使用通用策略和简单奖励函数，利用最少的先验知识学习了所有步态。这与大多数先前的运动学习方法形成对比，后者通常依赖于手工设计的策略类，明确编码了平衡和步行的概念（Tedrake 等人，2004；Geng 等人，2006；Wampler & Popović, 2009）。

items.en: To evaluate TRPO on a partially observed task with complex observations, we trained policies for playing Atari games, using raw images as input. The games require learning a variety of behaviors, such as dodging bullets and hitting balls with paddles. Aside from the high dimensionality, challenging elements of these games include delayed rewards (no immediate penalty is incurred when a life is lost in Breakout or Space Invaders); complex sequences of behavior (Q*bert requires a character to hop on 212121 different platforms); and non-stationary image statistics (Enduro involves a changing and flickering background).
items.zh: 为了在具有复杂观测的部分可观测任务上评估TRPO，我们使用原始图像作为输入，训练了玩Atari游戏的策略。这些游戏需要学习各种行为，例如躲避子弹和用球拍击球。除了高维度之外，这些游戏的挑战性元素包括延迟奖励（在Breakout或Space Invaders中失去一条生命时不会立即受到惩罚）；复杂的行为序列（Q*bert需要角色在212121个不同的平台上跳跃）；以及非平稳的图像统计（Enduro涉及变化和闪烁的背景）。

items.en: We tested our algorithms on the same seven games reported on in (Mnih et al., 2013) and (Guo et al., 2014), which are made available through the Arcade Learning Environment (Bellemare et al., 2013) The images were preprocessed following the protocol in Mnih et al (2013), and the policy was represented by the convolutional neural network shown in Figure 3, with two convolutional layers with 161616 channels and stride 222, followed by one fully-connected layer with 202020 units, yielding 33,500 parameters.
items.zh: 我们在(Mnih等人，2013)和(Guo等人，2014)中报告的相同七个游戏上测试了我们的算法，这些游戏通过街机学习环境(Bellemare等人，2013)提供。图像按照Mnih等人(2013)中的协议进行预处理，策略由图3所示的卷积神经网络表示，该网络有两个卷积层，每层有161616个通道和步长2，随后是一个有202020个单元的全连接层，共产生33,500个参数。

items.en: The results of the vine and single path algorithms are summarized in Table 1, which also includes an expert human performance and two recent methods: deep Q𝑄Q-learning (Mnih et al., 2013), and a combination of Monte-Carlo Tree Search with supervised training (Guo et al., 2014), called UCC-I. The 500 iterations of our algorithm took about 30 hours (with slight variation between games) on a 16-core computer. While our method only outperformed the prior methods on some of the games, it consistently achieved reasonable scores. Unlike the prior methods, our approach was not designed specifically for this task. The ability to apply the same policy search method to methods as diverse as robotic locomotion and image-based game playing demonstrates the generality of TRPO.
items.zh: 藤蔓算法和单路径算法的结果总结在表1中，该表还包括专家人类表现和两种近期方法：深度Q学习(Mnih等人，2013)以及蒙特卡洛树搜索与监督训练的结合(Guo等人，2014)，称为UCC-I。我们的算法运行500次迭代大约需要30小时（不同游戏略有差异），使用一台16核计算机。虽然我们的方法仅在某些游戏上优于先前的方法，但它始终取得了合理的分数。与先前的方法不同，我们的方法并非专门为此任务设计。将相同的策略搜索方法应用于机器人运动控制和基于图像的游戏等多样化的任务，展示了TRPO的通用性。

items.en: We proposed and analyzed trust region methods for optimizing stochastic control policies. We proved monotonic improvement for an algorithm that repeatedly optimizes a local approximation to the expected return of the policy with a KL divergence penalty, and we showed that an approximation to this method that incorporates a KL divergence constraint achieves good empirical results on a range of challenging policy learning tasks, outperforming prior methods. Our analysis also provides a perspective that unifies policy gradient and policy iteration methods, and shows them to be special limiting cases of an algorithm that optimizes a certain objective subject to a trust region constraint.
items.zh: 我们提出并分析了用于优化随机控制策略的信任域方法。我们证明了一种算法的单调改进，该算法通过KL散度惩罚反复优化策略期望回报的局部近似，并且我们展示了该方法的近似形式（包含KL散度约束）在一系列具有挑战性的策略学习任务上取得了良好的实证结果，优于先前的方法。我们的分析还提供了一个统一策略梯度和策略迭代方法的视角，并表明它们是在信任域约束下优化特定目标的算法的特殊极限情况。

items.en: In the domain of robotic locomotion, we successfully learned controllers for swimming, walking and hopping in a physics simulator, using general purpose neural networks and minimally informative rewards. To our knowledge, no prior work has learned controllers from scratch for all of these tasks, using a generic policy search method and non-engineered, general-purpose policy representations. In the game-playing domain, we learned convolutional neural network policies that used raw images as inputs. This requires optimizing extremely high-dimensional policies, and only two prior methods report successful results on this task.
items.zh: 在机器人运动领域，我们成功地在物理模拟器中学习了游泳、行走和跳跃的控制器，使用了通用神经网络和最小信息量的奖励。据我们所知，先前没有工作使用通用的策略搜索方法和非工程化的通用策略表示从头开始学习所有这些任务的控制器。在游戏领域，我们学习了使用原始图像作为输入的卷积神经网络策略。这需要优化极高维度的策略，只有两种先前的方法报告了在此任务上的成功结果。

items.en: Since the method we proposed is scalable and has strong theoretical foundations, we hope that it will serve as a jumping-off point for future work on training large, rich function approximators for a range of challenging problems. At the intersection of the two experimental domains we explored, there is the possibility of learning robotic control policies that use vision and raw sensory data as input, providing a unified scheme for training robotic controllers that perform both perception and control. The use of more sophisticated policies, including recurrent policies with hidden state, could further make it possible to roll state estimation and control into the same policy in the partially-observed setting. By combining our method with model learning, it would also be possible to substantially reduce its sample complexity, making it applicable to real-world settings where samples are expensive.
items.zh: 由于我们提出的方法具有可扩展性和坚实的理论基础，我们希望它能成为未来在训练大规模、丰富函数逼近器以解决一系列具有挑战性问题方面工作的起点。在我们探索的两个实验领域的交叉点上，有可能学习使用视觉和原始感官数据作为输入的机器人控制策略，为训练同时执行感知和控制的机器人控制器提供统一方案。使用更复杂的策略，包括具有隐藏状态的循环策略，可以进一步在部分可观测设置中将状态估计和控制整合到同一个策略中。通过将我们的方法与模型学习相结合，还可以大幅降低其样本复杂度，使其适用于样本昂贵的现实世界场景。
